userMessage:
Audit all imports and usages of the following components across the entire StringRay codebase. I need a complete dependency map before removing anything.

Components to audit:

**src/skills/ files to potentially remove:**
- `src/skills/matcher.ts` (exports: SkillMatcher, matchTaskToSkill, getSkillTools)
- `src/skills/discovery.ts` (exports: SkillDiscoveryService)
- `src/skills/registry.ts` (exports: SkillRegistry, initializeSkillRegistry, getSkillRegistry)
- `src/skills/pipeline.ts` (exports: SkillPipeline)
- `src/skills/watcher.ts` (exports: SkillWatcher)
- `src/skills/index.ts` (re-exports everything)

**src/delegation/routing/ files to potentially remove:**
- `src/delegation/routing/keyword-matcher.ts`
- `src/delegation/routing/complexity-router.ts`
- `src/delegation/routing/history-matcher.ts`
- `src/delegation/routing/router-core.ts`
- `src/delegation/routing/interfaces.ts`

**src/delegation/config/ files to potentially remove:**
- `src/delegation/config/default-mappings/` (entire directory)
- `src/delegation/config/routing-mappings.ts`
- `src/delegation/config/routing-config.ts`

**src/delegation/ files to potentially remove:**
- `src/delegation/task-skill-router.ts`
- `src/delegation/session-coordinator.ts`
- `src/delegation/complexity-calibrator.ts`
- `src/delegation/complexity-core.ts`
- `src/delegation/codebase-context-analyzer.ts`
- `src/delegation/dependency-graph-builder.ts`
- `src/delegation/ast-code-parser.ts`

**Config files to potentially remove:**
- `.opencode/strray/routing-mappings.json`

**CLI commands to potentially remove:**
- `src/cli/commands/skill-list.ts`
- `src/cli/commands/skill-install.ts`
- `src/cli/commands/agent-skills.ts`

**Plugin to clean:**
- `src/plugin/strray-codex-injection.ts` (skill matching block ~lines 1163-1195)

For EACH file above, find:
1. All files that import from it
2. All files that reference it (even without direct import)
3. Whether the importing file ALSO needs to be modified or can stay as-is

Also check:
- `src/core/boot-orchestrator.ts` (known importer of skills registry)
- `src/cli/index.ts` (CLI command registration)
- `src/delegation/index.ts` (re-exports)
- `src/index.ts` (main exports)
- Test files in `src/__tests__/`

Return a structured list grouped by: "SAFE TO DELETE" (no external imports), "HAS IMPORTERS" (list them), and "NEEDS MODIFICATION" (list what needs changing).
